**Medical Assessment and Rating Board for Indian System of Medicine**

**National Commission for Indian System of Medicine, New Delhi**

**Assessment Report of Sowa-Rigpa Medical Colleges for the Academic Session 2026-27**

**File no. 3-4/MARB/2025-SR.(02)**

**Dated:-GOLDEN**

It is submitted that **Central Institute of Sowa-Rigpa, Leh, Ladakh (Inst. ID-SOW001)** was visited on **2026-06-20 and 2026-06-21** to assess the available facilities of teaching and practical training for **Annual visitation for issuance of Annual permission with intake capacity of 30 seats in UG (BSRMS) course for the academic session 2026-27 under section 28/29 of NCISM Act, 2020** by the visitors namely:-

| **S. No.** | **Visitor’s Name** | **Visitor ID** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dr. Tsering Norbu | V05011 |
| 2 | Dr. Padma Dolkar | V05074 |

Further, after examination of the visitation report along with all the annexures, the following compliance/shortcomings have been observed against MESAR (UG) Sowa-Rigpa 2023:-

**Land:**
1. Minimum requirement of land (plain region) — Land available is 3 acres against the requirement of 3 acres (plain region) - fulfilling.

**Clinical Departments:**
2. Minimum number of clinical departments — No. of clinical departments is 4 against the minimum requirement of 4 - fulfilling.

**Herbal Garden:**
3. Herbal garden - minimum area — Herbal garden area is 1500 sq.mt. against the requirement of 1500 sq.mt. - fulfilling.
4. Herbal garden - minimum medicinal plant species — No. of medicinal plant species is 70 against the minimum requirement of 70 - fulfilling.

**Equipment & Instruments:**
5. Availability of required equipment and instruments — Mean availability of required equipment is 80% against the minimum requirement of 75% - fulfilling.

**Biometric Attendance (AEBAS):**
6. Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS) — Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System is implemented and functional.

**Hospital Functionality:**
7. In-Patient Department - minimum number of beds (3:2 student-bed ratio) — Total number of IPD beds is 20 against the minimum requirement of 20.
8. Average attendance of patients in IPD per day — Average attendance of patient in IPD per day is 6 against the minimum requirement of 6.
9. Average attendance of patients in OPD per day — Average attendance of patient in OPD per day is 54 against the minimum requirement of 60 - not fulfilling.
10. Minimum In-Patient Department bed occupancy — Average bed occupancy is 30% against the minimum requirement of 30%.

**Teaching staff:-** Teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Non-teaching staff:-** Non-teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Hospital staff:-** Hospital staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Punitive Action Summary (Punitive Policy 2026-27, approved in the 160th Board Meeting)**

| **Deficiency** | **Consequence** | **Seats** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Average attendance of patients in OPD per day: 10.00% deficiency | Seat reduction | 1 |

Cumulative seat reduction of **1 seats** (3.33% of the sanctioned intake of 30).
